title: Disposable Flat Fold FFP3 Mask
shortDescription: Suitable for a single 8-hour use against solid & liquid  based aerosols in high dust areas. Low breathing resistance for increased wearer comfort. Adjustable head straps
description: Suitable for a single 8-hour use against solid & liquid  based aerosols in high dust areas. Low breathing resistance for increased wearer comfort. Adjustable head straps

features: Suitable for a single 8-hour use against solid & liquid  based aerosols in high dust areas
Low breathing resistance for increased wearer comfort
Contour face seal for performance & comfort
Soft foam nosepiece for a custom fit
Exhalation valve reduces hot air build-up & provides easy  breathing in hot & humid environments
Dolomite tested for resistance to clogging
standards: Dolomite tested as per BSI test 255/7633484
